title: urachne holciformis
intro: Urachne holciformis, also known as the thorny cushion plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Urachne holciformis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Urachne holciformis are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
